<<code language="ocaml" | (M : sig
       type key
       type value
       val compare : Request_cache.Make.key -> Request_cache.Make.key -> int
       val get : Request_cache.Make.key -> Request_cache.Make.value Lwt.t
     end)
  ->
  sig
    type key = M.key
    type value = M.value
    val has : key -> bool
    val set : key -> value -> unit
    val reset : key -> unit
    val get : key -> value Lwt.t
  end >>
